title: Lluna Texture Pack
description: A texture pack that utilizes Optifine to modify the vanilla Llama textures and model to match Lluna from Minecraft: Story Mode Season 2.
body:
# Lluna Texture Pack
Ever played Minecraft: Story Mode Season 2 and wanted Lluna in your Minecraft world? Install this Resource Pack and enjoy!

## Features

 ***THIS WILL ONLY AFFECT NORMAL LLAMAS. YOU ONLY GET THE LLUNA TEXTURES ON A WHITE LLAMA.***
 - Give Lluna a purple carpet for the scarf.
 - Give Lluna a black carpet for the "Associate" Outfit.

## Instructions

 - Install Optifine or EMF and ETF for this resource pack to work
 - Once installed find a normal white llama (If the Llama has blue eyes when the pack is applied, it is a white llama).
 - Add carpets listed above for the outfits,


![Lluna Scarf Outfit](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1225611747885322262/1272388006996738058/2024-08-11_19.53.43.png?ex=67ce54ac&is=67cd032c&hm=01e9f87d5a3f7d03e18f91abfa5e96cd1a2eb2f98a95c1dc9b0a3afb181ba009&)

![Lluna Assosiate Outfit](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1225611747885322262/1272390287372845178/2024-08-11_20.03.06.png?ex=67b1fe8c&is=67b0ad0c&hm=ac07b0bb641783164e80d42ae3c7c810e61ffdcc7839fcca8d30f159aea2da5c&)
